Welcome to MindBuddy

Your personal mental wellness companion for students. Let's get to know you first!

You

Student Crisis Support

If you are feeling extremely overwhelmed or are having thoughts of self-harm, please reach out immediately:

988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline

Call or Text 988 · Available 24/7 (US/Canada)

Call 988

Crisis Text Line

Text HOME to 741741 · 24/7

Text Now

The Trevor Project

Call 1-866-488-7386 · LGBTQ+ Youth Support

Call

International Hotlines

Find resources worldwide at findahelpline.com

Visit

You are not alone. Reaching out is a sign of strength. A trusted friend, parent, or counsellor can also be your first step.
